transcript: Speaker A (Human): Tum kab soti ho? [When do you sleep?] Speaker A (Human): When do you go to sleep? Speaker B (AI): Main 10 baje soti. [I sleep at 10.] Speaker A (Human): I sleep at 10 at night. Speaker B (AI): Tum subah kitne baje uthti ho? [What time do you wake up in the morning?] Speaker A (Human): When do you wake up? Speaker B (AI): Main subah 6 baje uthti. [I wake up at 6 in the morning.] Speaker A (Human): I wake up at 6 in the morning. Speaker A (Human): Aise hi fluent English bolne ke liye MySivi app download karo. Sirf ek rupee mein AI teacher ke saath daily 15-20 minute practice karo. Aur apne confidence ko next level pe lekar jao. Download MySivi app now. [To speak fluent English like this, download the MySivi app. Practice daily for 15-20 minutes with an AI teacher for just one rupee. And take your confidence to the next level. Download MySivi app now.]
on_screen_text: Tum kab soti ho? [When do you sleep?], When do you go to sleep, Main 10 baje soti [I sleep at 10], I sleep at 10 at night, Tum subah kitne baje uthti ho? [What time do you wake up in the morning?], When do you wake up, Main subah 6 baje uthti [I wake up at 6 in the morning], I wake up at 6 in the morning, Aise hi fluent [Like this, fluent], English bolne [To speak English], MySivi, Sirf ek rupee [Just one rupee], mein [in], saath daily 15-20 [with daily 15-20], minute practice, Aur apne confidence [And your confidence], ko next level [to the next level], MySivi AI English Speaking, Download MySivi app now
summary: The ad features a split-screen conversation where a human translates Hindi sentences spoken by an AI avatar into English. The presenter then introduces the MySivi app, highlighting a promotional offer of 3 days of premium access for ₹1. Viewers are encouraged to download the app to practice speaking English with an AI teacher for 15-20 minutes daily.
